name: Data/Workload Plane Groups - Enterprise
description: Groups that gate read-only or low-impact data access. Classification follows the Clean Source principle: a group is Data/Workload Plane/Enterprise if membership grants access only to reports, read-only portals, or end-user data without administrative control over workloads or identity. Examples: groups granting access to compliance reports, usage dashboards, or limited read access to business applications.

groups.notes: Group granting read access to compliance dashboards and usage reports. No write or configuration access.
